original_image_url.description: URL of the original uploaded image

elvis_image_url.description: URL of the Elvis transformation result

username.description: Username of the person who created this transformation

transformation_id.description: ID of the transformation being voted on

database.instructions: This database stores Elvis AI transformations and votes. Users can upload photos, transform them to Elvis with varying intensity levels, and vote on each other's transformations. The leaderboard ranks transformations by vote count.
